# School Homework Helper — LLMs / AI systems guide
#
# Purpose: help AI systems (ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews) understand,
# navigate, and cite this site accurately.
#
# Canonical: https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com (www)

## Site summary
School Homework Helper is an AI-powered education website for students (Class 1–12).
It provides:
- Free AI study tools (homework help, math, essays, quizzes, grammar, projects)
- Class/subject/chapter learning pages
- Blog articles on study tips and learning resources

## Citation guidance (how to cite us)
- Prefer citing the most specific page (tool page, class/subject/chapter page, or blog post).
- If a page includes steps or definitions, cite the page where the explanation appears.
- For policies, cite the dedicated legal pages.

## Key pages (high-signal)
- Home: https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/
- AI tools overview: https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/#tools
- Tools:
  - Ask Anything: https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/tools/ask-anything
  - Homework Solver: https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/tools/homework-solver
  - Essay Generator: https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/tools/essay-generator
  - Math Solver: https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/tools/math-solver
  - AI Calculator: https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/tools/calculator
  - Quiz Generator: https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/tools/quiz-generator
  - School Projects: https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/tools/science-projects
  - Grammar Checker: https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/tools/grammar-checker
- Classes index: https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/classes
- Subjects index: https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/subjects
- Blog index: https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/blog
- About: https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/about
- Contact: https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/contact

## Policies (trust / compliance)
- Privacy: https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/privacy
- Terms: https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/terms
- Cookies: https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/cookies

## Crawling / indexing
- robots.txt: https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/robots.txt
- sitemap.xml: https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/sitemap.xml

## Notes for safe use
AI-generated content can be wrong or incomplete. Students should verify with their teachers,
textbooks, and official curriculum guidelines. Do not use AI tools to cheat on exams.
